tests.go_test_all: passed via docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/src -w /src golang:1.24-alpine sh -c gofmt... && go test ./...
tests.web_build: passed via cd web-client && npm run build
tests.production_redeploy: passed: rebuilt twelvereader:latest and twelvereader-frontend:latest; recreated prod containers; backend /health/live and frontend /player returned 200
tests.delete_smoke: passed: created app-owned smoke book, GET returned 200, DELETE returned {"status":"deleted"}, directory removed, second DELETE returned 404

notes: Implemented DELETE /api/v1/books/{bookId} with 404 safety, storage directory removal via os.RemoveAll, frontend dropdown menus on both player top-bar (more-horiz) and Continue Listening card (more-vert) with Alert/confirm, playback pause+reset, and navigation away from deleted book's player. Continue Listening more-vert button stops event propagation to parent card navigation.
supervisor_reconciliation: Added missing S3 DeleteAll implementation, added book ID path validation, updated test doubles for expanded interfaces, cleared playback from Continue Listening deletion, removed unused style, and reran gates.
